Tucked inside the Old School on Main Road, Walter's is the kind of coffee house where the giraffe watches the till, the dogs wear medals, and the brownies don't last long. Rated 4.7 from 153 people who agree.

The Story

A schoolhouse turned clubhouse.

Walter's lives inside the Old School on Main Road — dark green walls, a propeller fan spinning slowly overhead, and a full gallery of aristocratic dogs in gold frames watching over every table. A taxidermy giraffe leans in beside the chalkboard, apparently unbothered by the espresso machine.

It's a proper neighbourhood coffee house: flat whites and cortados made properly, a cabinet stacked with brookies and Nutella brownies, and a kitchen that turns out sausage rolls people still talk about. Bring the dog. Bring the laptop. Stay a while.

Open daily

Coffee from 10AM, weekends included

Dog friendly

Bowls out, portraits on the wall

Made fresh

Brownies, brookies & cookies baked in-house

Fully licensed

Dine-in, takeaway & delivery

The Menu

Everything on the chalkboard.

Straight from the till at Walter's — coffee, tea, brownies, brookies, cookies and cold drinks.

★★★★★

"Absolutely fantastic little coffee house — we came on the off chance for Mother's Day without booking, and the staff went out of their way to fit us in."

GS
Glitter Splash2 reviews · 3 months ago
★★★★★

"We went for a Sunday study session. The two girls working were lovely and accommodating, service was quick, and the coffee, tea and brownie were all delicious."

VK
Varvara Koryak5 reviews · 2 months ago
★★★★★

"A lovely Mother's Day breakfast — the coffee and food were great value. I recommend the French toast, it's clearly popular for a reason."
